svg.text: Tips for abbreviating periodical titles in references: words ending in “-ology”
can be ended after the “-ol.”; words ending in “-graphy” after the “-gr.”;
compound words using the abbreviation of the last word. Some abbreviations apply
to more than one word (e.g., “Mathematical” and “Mathematics” are both “Math.”).
Common abbreviations of words in references (sample).
Scope note. The full word list, the List of Publishers (§B), and the Abbreviations of
Periodicals With Non-English Titles (§C) continue in the same tabular form across pp. 21–43
